fields.body:
# Create PS Object for collecting status as we go
$PS_Results = New-Object -TypeName psobject
$PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Action" -Value "Get List of Organizational Units containing users"

$OU_List = @()

$ous = Get-ADOrganizationalUnit -Filter * -Properties CanonicalName
$ous | ForEach-Object{
        $this_ou = $_
        $this_dn = $this_ou.DistinguishedName
        if (((Get-ADUser -Filter "*" -SearchScope 1 -SearchBase "$this_dn")|measure  |select-object -ExpandProperty count) -ge 1 ) {
            $OU_List += $this_ou
    }
}
$PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "OrganizationalUnits" -Value $OU_List 

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $PS_Results | ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8'

nonfunctional_fields.name: [REST - TASK] Powershell: Get AD OUs containing Users

nonfunctional_fields.name: [REWST - TEMPLATE] M365 License Lookup - Cron Updated
[REWST - TASK] List User Groups By UPN Or SID

fields.body:
$Results = @()

Add-PSSnapin Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn

$Results = Get-AcceptedDomain

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $Results | ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json'

# Create PS Object for collecting status as we go

# Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$PS_Results = New-Object -TypeName psobject

$ignore_sec_groups = @("Access Control Assistance Operators","Account Operators","Administrators","Allowed RODC Password Replication Group","Backup Operators","Certificate Service DCOM Access","Cert Publishers","Cloneable Domain Controllers","Cryptographic Operators","Denied RODC Password Replication Group","Device Owners","Distributed COM Users","DnsUpdateProxy","DnsAdmins","Domain Admins","Domain Computers","Domain Controllers","Domain Guests","Domain Users","Enterprise Admins","Enterprise Key Admins","Enterprise Read-only Domain Controllers","Event Log Readers","Group Policy Creator Owners","Guests","Hyper-V Administrators","IIS_IUSRS","Incoming Forest Trust Builders","Key Admins","Network Configuration Operators","Performance Log Users","Performance Monitor Users","Pre-Windows 2000 Compatible Access","Print Operators","Protected Users","RAS and IAS Servers","RDS Endpoint Servers","RDS Management Servers","RDS Remote Access Servers","Read-only Domain Controllers","Remote Desktop Users","Remote Management Users","Replicator","Schema Admins","Server Operators","Storage Replica Administrators","System Managed Accounts Group","Terminal Server License Servers","Users","Windows Authorization Access Group","WinRMRemoteWMIUsers_")

$SecurityGroups = [array]((Get-ADGroup -Filter "GroupCategory -eq 'Security'" | Where {$_.Name -notin $ignore_sec_groups}) | Select-Object Name, ObjectGUID)
$PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "SecurityGroups" -Value $SecurityGroups 


$DistributionGroups = [array]((Get-ADGroup -Filter "GroupCategory -eq 'Distribution'" -Properties mail | Select-Object Name, ObjectGUID, mail) )
$PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "DistributionGroups" -Value $DistributionGroups 


# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $PS_Results | ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8'

Add-PSSnapin Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn

$mailboxDatabase = Get-MailboxDatabase
$databasesInfo = @()

foreach ($database in $mailboxDatabase) {
    $databaseInfo = New-Object -TypeName psobject
    $databaseInfo | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Name" -Value $database.Name
    $databaseInfo | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Servers" -Value $database.Servers
    $databaseInfo | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Guid" -Value $database.Guid
    $databaseInfo | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Mailboxes" -Value (Get-Mailbox -Database $database.Name -ResultSize Unlimited).count
    $databasesInfo += $databaseInfo
}

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $databasesInfo| ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json'

nonfunctional_fields.name: [REWST - TEMPLATE] Powershell: Get All Unique Values for AD Attribute

fields.body:
# Input parameters from Rewst
$user_filter = "{{ CTX.user_filter }}"
$site_name = "{{ CTX.location_name }}"

# Create Object for POST Back to Rewst Later
$PS_Results = New-Object -TypeName psobject

# Get Users
$PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Filter" -Value $user_filter
try {
    if ($null -eq $site_name) {
        $Users = @(Get-ADUser -Filter "DisplayName -like '*$site_name*' -and Enabled -eq 'False'")
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Users" -Value $Users
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Match-Count" -Value $Users.Count
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "success" -Value $true
    }
    else {
        $Users = @(Get-ADUser -Filter $user_filter)
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Users" -Value $Users
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Match-Count" -Value $Users.Count
        $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "success" -Value $true
    }
}
catch {
    $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "Error" -Value "ERROR: Failed to list users with supplied filter."
    $PS_Results | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "success" -Value $false
}

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $PS_Results | ConvertTo-Json
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8'

fields.body:
$Results = @()

Add-PSSnapin Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn

$Results = Get-ExchangeServer

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $Results | ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json'

$Results = @()

Add-PSSnapin Microsoft.Exchange.Management.PowerShell.SnapIn

$Results = Get-Mailbox -Filter {recipienttypedetails -eq "SharedMailbox"} | select name, guid, OriginatingServer, Identity, WindowsEmailAddress

# Post results back to Rewst
$postData = $Results | ConvertTo-Json
$postData = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($postData)
Invoke-RestMethod -Method 'Post' -Uri $post_url -Body $postData -ContentType 'application/json'

input.query:
{%- if CTX.db_configs[0].database_type == "sql_server" -%}
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM rewst_cache_org_data
            WHERE rewst_org_id = '{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}' AND
            object_type = '{{ item().cache_option }}' AND
			object_id = '{{ item().id }}')
BEGIN
    UPDATE rewst_cache_org_data
        SET rewst_org_id = '{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}',
			object_type = '{{ item().cache_option }}',
			object_id = '{{ item().id }}',
			cached_object_display_name = '{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
			cached_object_value = '{{ ((item().label|d ) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
			default_option = 0,
			last_sync = '{% now 'utc', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ' %}'
            WHERE rewst_org_id = '{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}' AND
            object_type = '{{ item().cache_option }}' AND
			object_id = '{{ item().id }}'
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	INSERT INTO rewst_cache_org_data(rewst_org_id, object_type, object_id, cached_object_display_name, cached_object_value, last_sync, default_option)
	VALUES('{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}','{{ item().cache_option }}','{{ item().id }}','{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}','{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}','{% now 'utc', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ' %}','0')
END
{%- elif CTX.db_configs[0].database_type == "mysql" -%}
SET autocommit = 1;
INSERT INTO rewst_cache_org_data
    (rewst_org_id, object_type, object_id, cached_object_display_name, cached_object_value, last_sync, default_option)
VALUES
    ('{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}',
     '{{ item().cache_option }}',
     '{{ item().id }}',
     '{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
     '{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
     '{% now 'utc', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' %}',
     0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
        rewst_org_id = '{{ COMPLETED_WORKFLOW.ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}',
        object_type = '{{ item().cache_option }}',
        object_id = '{{ item().id }}',
        cached_object_display_name = '{{ ((item().label|d) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
        cached_object_value = '{{ ((item().label|d ) or (item().name|d) or (item().id|d))|replace('\'',"") }}',
        default_option = 0,
        last_sync = '{% now 'utc', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' %}'
{%- endif -%}

{{ RESULT.result.value }}
{{ [{"label": (tickets.id | string) + ' - ' + tickets.summary, "id": tickets.id} for tickets in CTX.cwm_tickets] | sort(attribute="id", reverse=true) }}

input.raw_query:
query {
  getTicketList(input: {
    condition: {
      joinOperator: "AND"
      operands: [
        {
          attribute: "status"
          operator: "isNot"
          value: "Closed"
        }
      ]
    }
  }) {
    tickets {
      ticketId
      displayId
      subject
      ticketType
      requestType
      source
      client
      site
      requester
      additionalRequester
      followers
      techGroup
      technician
      status
      priority
      impact
      urgency
      category
      subcategory
      cause
      subcause
      resolutionCode
      sla
      createdTime
      updatedTime
      firstResponseDueTime
      firstResponseTime
      firstResponseViolated
      resolutionDueTime
      resolutionTime
      resolutionViolated
      customFields
      worklogTimespent
    }
    listInfo {
      totalCount
      hasMore
    }
  }
}

input.query:
{%- if CTX.db_configs[0].database_type == "sql_server" -%}
SELECT [object_type],
	   [object_id],
	   [cached_object_value],
	   [cached_object_display_name],
	   [default_option]
FROM rewst_cache_org_data
WHERE rewst_org_id = '{{ ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}' AND
	  object_type = '{{ CTX.byod_object_type}}'
{%- elif CTX.db_configs[0].database_type == "mysql" -%}
SELECT `object_type`,
       `object_id`,
       `cached_object_value`,
       `cached_object_display_name`,
       `default_option`
FROM rewst_cache_org_data
WHERE rewst_org_id = '{{ ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}' AND
      object_type = '{{ CTX.byod_object_type}}'
{%- endif -%}

{%- if CTX.db_configs[0].database_type == "sql_server" -%}
SELECT [object_type],
	   [object_id],
	   [cached_object_value],
	   [cached_object_display_name],
	   [default_option]
FROM rewst_cache_org_data
WHERE rewst_org_id = '{{ ORG.ATTRIBUTES.id }}' AND
	  object_type = '{{ CTX.byod_object_type}}' AND
	  default_option = 1
